comment.body: Yup I think I am going to do the same. I cannot find a good entry right now on the Puts. Do not want to risk it into a low liquidity zone which can produce wild results and 2 way trading. Can burn late puts or calls. Will wait for the 20d retest/retracement and wait for the weekend dust to settle. The 10% correction from peak on Spy 640 is 576 territory. Already price is at 620 and if on monday it nose dives half of the move would be done, no point chasing with a late put.  Better R/R on the retracement.
